name: The Machine
description:
The Machine is a mysterious entity and is the metaphysical structure that is connected to Nevada and everything that exists, existed, and will exist.

they was created by The Maker, but both are Siblings because both have infinite power, the Machine defines all matter, space, time, destiny, intention, purpose, every story about every hero and villain, under its influence, under its limitless sprawl.

the Machine is close to its redefinition, closer to the madness, but that will only happen if it merges with its creator.

it is a character from the Madness Combat Series.
creator: Cookie master
